description: baseline: cold-process TUI startup (Runtime.create + App.create), best-of-5

Benchmark fix: avoid asyncio.run() cleanup wait for background LSP-extension eager warmup thread (fire-and-forget, not on real critical path) — corrects ~120-150ms of measurement inflation, not a real app change

computer_use extension: lazy-construct the platform Desktop backend (deferred PyObjC/Quartz/AppKit import) instead of eagerly at register() — saves ~400ms/startup for a tool most sessions never use; pytest -q passes (2653 passed)

web engines: defer ddgs/exa/jina/tavily search-backend imports to first use (was eager in engines/__init__.py) via lazy _build_* + module __getattr__; avoids jina's h2/hpack (HTTP/2) import chain and exa/tavily deps when unused. Wall-clock effect is small/noisy this run (system load rose vs earlier runs — see prompt.md), but confirmed via profiling that h2/hpack no longer import; httpx itself is still paid elsewhere (local model discovery constructs AsyncClient regardless). pytest -k 'web or search or fetch or engine' passes (102 passed)

packages: memoize PackageManager.site_packages() per venv — collapses repeated subprocess spawns (one per extension/resource with declared deps hitting the same venv) into one per process; confirmed via profiling (site_packages dropped out of top-40 cumulative, _ensure_dependencies calls 5/4->5/2); pytest -q passes (2653 passed)

local model discovery: run each backend (ollama/lmstudio/vllm/llamacpp) in its own thread via asyncio.to_thread(asyncio.run, ...) instead of as bare tasks on the caller's event loop — httpx.AsyncClient construction (~0.3-0.4s total, connection pool/transport setup) no longer competes with startup on the main thread; confirmed via profiling (4x httpx.AsyncClient.__init__ gone from main-thread top-40). pytest -q passes (2653 passed, incl. tests/test_local_model_discovery.py)

themes: ThemeRegistry._ensure_builtins() now registers one lazy per-file factory (keyed by filename stem, verified to match every builtin theme's declared name:) instead of eagerly parsing+validating all 17 builtin theme YAML files on every startup regardless of which one is selected; only the actually-selected theme gets parsed. pytest -q passes (2653 passed) + manual check all 17 builtins still load correctly via the lazy path

no-op perf-wise: fixed mypy typing in local model discovery (Coroutine instead of Awaitable) introduced by the threading change — confirms `mypy tau/` regressed by 0 (actually fixed one pre-existing error, 6->5); pytest -q passes (2653 passed); re-confirms ~0.39s is stable

computer_use: defer ComputerTool/pydantic-schema import (was module-scope, unconditional) to inside register() past the enabled-check — extension is disabled by default (manifest.json), so most real installs now skip this entirely; no measurable delta in THIS benchmark since computer_use happens to be enabled in this dev environment. Verified via a manual harness: module import alone, and register() with enabled=False, never import .computer; enabled=True imports and registers correctly. pytest -q passes (2653 passed)
